title: Flatten require-extension validation in compile()
description: The require-extension check in compile() (lib.rs:92-120) uses 28 lines of imperative nested loops to validate a single invariant. The evaluator's own variables_enabled detection (evaluator.rs:75-86) does the same form-walk in 11 lines using iterator combinators. The compile()-side check should adopt the same style: a flat iterator chain that collects all required extension strings and checks each against KNOWN_EXTENSIONS.
